message:
feat(parser): add rule_id to classDef/style compatibility diagnostic

- Added `rule_id` field to Diagnostic struct in fm-core for machine-readable diagnostics
- Added `with_rule_id()` builder method to Diagnostic
- Set rule_id "style-directive-not-applied" on the consolidated styling warning
- Updated test to verify rule_id is set

This makes the diagnostic machine-readable per acceptance criteria:
category=Compatibility, rule_id=style-directive-not-applied

Closes: bd-uwtl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
